title: Crayon tabbed-Doc marker (.crayon-tabs.json)
description: Present in a directory IFF that directory is materialized as a single tabbed Google Doc (not a plain Drive folder). Self-describing: maps each tab to a .md file and records tab order.

docId.description: The Google Doc id this directory maps to.

order.description: Tab order as a list of the sibling .md filenames (without directory prefix). Must be a permutation of the 'file' values in 'tabs'.

tabId.description: Immutable Google Docs tab id (Docs API can write into it but not create/delete it).

title.description: Tab title as shown in the Docs UI.

file.description: Sibling .md filename this tab maps to (no directory prefix).
